log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 5 falling damage. HP: 173/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

→ Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 8 vs DC 10]
=== ROUND 5 ===

→ Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
